issues.title: `spring.ai.vertex.ai.gemini.chat.options.model` doesn’t auto complete
issues.body: this needs to be added to some `@ConfigurationProperties` object or some index somewhere. it's hard to know the this property is available, otherwise.

comments.body: I'd like to contribute to this! 🙌
IMO, meta data json should be in `spring-ai/auto-configurations/models/spring-ai-autoconfigure-model-vertex-ai/src/main/resources/META-INF` for auto complete.
Just by adding `@NestedConfigurationProperty`, the meta data can be generated properly!
